sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.

feat.name: Crane Flutter
feat.text: You interpose your arm between yourself and your opponent. Your circumstance bonus to AC from Crane Stance increases to +3 against the triggering attack. If the attack misses you and the attacker is within your reach, you can immediately make a crane wing Strike against the attacker at a –2 penalty.

traits.name: Monk
traits.text: Abilities with this trait are from the monk class. A weapon with this trait is primarily used by monks.

archetype.name: Martial Artist
archetype.note: This archetype offers Crane Flutter at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Wild Mimic
archetype.note: This archetype offers Crane Flutter at a different level than displayed here.

feat.trigger: You are targeted with an attack by an observed attacker.
